source: live CDP getComputedStyle (2026-05-15) on https://www.dabangapp.com/ and /map/onetwo
weight_pattern: 400 → 700 cliff with sparing 500 for filter/chip emphasis — same pattern as Zigbang/Bunjang KR marketplace cohort
notes: Pretendard Variable (open-source Korean variable font) is now the converged default for modern KR consumer-tech (Toss, Karrot, Zigbang, Bunjang, Dabang). Dabang's variant is unremarkable in choice but distinctive in restraint — no display accent face, no second family for headings. Every word on the surface is the same family at one of two weights.
